历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Henan Province is 40 students in 2025, increasing to 50 students in 2026, an expansion of 25%, which is a relatively large expansion and helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 19th (shared with BNU main campus), stable in the top 20 in recent years, belonging to top normal universities; 2026 reputation evaluation neutral/mixed, no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity relatively hot (overall ranking 37th), short video exposure medium to high, reflecting increased attention for applications; Education A+, Psychology A+, Mathematics A, Systems Science A-, etc., highly correlated with Zhuhai Campus majors such as Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, etc.) and Science Experimental Class (including Geography, Psychology, Biology, Chemistry), strongly attractive to science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors are highly recommended socially; Mathematics/Statistics recommended; Teacher Training/Education divided for observation; Henan Province total number of college entrance exam takers in 2026 is approximately 1.2 million, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 907,000), Physics Category candidates estimated at about 734,000, competition significantly intensified.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking, the 25% expansion in 2026, and the substantial increase in Henan candidates (about 32%) basically offset each other, but the Zhuhai Campus's rising popularity and major offerings including Artificial Intelligence/Data Science and other hot directions, the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category is expected to move slightly forward compared to 2025; predicted minimum ranking approximately 11407, range 10907–11907.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Mathematics (Zhuhai Campus) (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, Systems Science and Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence (Innovation Experimental Class), Applied Statistics)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Zhuhai Campus) (including Economics (Data Science Direction), Financial Technology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Science Experimental Class (Zhuhai Campus) (including Geography, Psychology, Biology, Chemistry)
- Management Science (Qian Xuesen Intelligent Management Excellence Talent Experimental Class)
- Education (BNU Education, BIT AI Joint Degree Training Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Biology (Teacher Training) (National Public-Funded Normal Students)
- Chemistry (Teacher Training) (National Public-Funded Normal Students)
- Physics (Teacher Training) (National Public-Funded Normal Students)
- English (Teacher Training) (National Public-Funded Normal Students)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (10907–11907), it is recommended to focus on Mathematics and Social Science Experimental Class as main targets, Science Experimental Class and joint degree programs as safe choices, and public-funded normal student majors with job security as fallback; for rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range, focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Henan Province is 17 students in 2025 and remains 17 students in 2026, with a stable plan, having no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 19th (shared with Beijing Normal University main campus), stable in the top 20 in recent years, belonging to top normal universities; 2026 reputation evaluation neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management response incidents, no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity relatively hot (overall ranking 37th), short video exposure medium to high, reflecting increased attention for applications; Education, Psychology, Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese History, Geography, Marxist Theory are all A+ disciplines, highly related to the Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class (Chinese Language and Literature, English, History) at Zhuhai Campus, strongly attractive to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language/Literature major social popularity relatively hot (recommended), teacher training/education divided and wait-and-see; Henan Province 2026 total number of college entrance exam takers approximately 1.2 million, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 907,000), History Category candidates estimated proportionally at about 466,000, competition significantly intensified.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on comprehensive historical baseline rankings, stable enrollment plan in 2026, significant increase in Henan candidates, and stable to rising school reputation and popularity, it is expected that competition in History Category in 2026 will intensify, with the minimum admission ranking slightly moving forward compared to 2025; predicted minimum ranking approximately 906, range 806–1006.
